mainEntity.name: What to Do When AI Models Get Your Legal Services Wrong
mainEntity.text: What to Do When AI Models Get Your Legal Services Wrong

acceptedAnswer.text: Is Perplexity giving out wrong info about your firm? This happens when AI scrambles outdated web data. You need to 'force' a refresh by updating your digital footprint with AI-optimized structures. Ensure your practice areas are crystal clear to the bot. If you want to be the go-to authority in Perplexity's answers, we have the roadmap. Call us.
